basic_details.job_title: DHS Tirupathur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 ANM, MPHW and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest District Health Society Tirupathur (DHS Tirupathur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Various Contractual Posts! This new recruitment drive offers 25 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants meeting the prescribed age criteria (up to 35, 40, or 50 years depending on the post) and possessing qualifications such as ANM Course, 8th Standard, DMLT, Nursing, Pharmacy, Occupational Therapy, Clinical Psychology, Special Education, Commerce, and other relevant qualifications can apply through offline mode on or before 13-06-2026. Find all details about the DHS Tirupathur Various C

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for some posts, Max 35 years for Account Assistant, Max 50 years for Mid-Level Health Provider and Staff Nurse
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 40 years for Occupational Therapist, Special Educator for Behavioural Therapy, Psychologist, and Clinical Psychologist. Maximum age limit is 35 years for Account Assistant. Maximum age limit is 50 years for Mid-Level Health Provider and Staff Nurse. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: ANM Course, 8th Standard, DMLT, Bachelor's/Master's in Occupational Therapy, Special Education D.Ed/B.Ed/M.Ed, Master's in Child Psychology, B.Com/B.A Corporate/BCS with Tally, D.Pharm, Plus Two with Biology and MPHW Training, GNM/B.Sc Nursing, Psychiatry Nursing Training, M.Sc/M.Phil Clinical Psychology
qualification.details: ANM/UHN: Should have passed Secondary School Examination and two-year ANM conducted from DPH institution / nursing council. Should produce ANM certificate issued by Director of Public Health & Preventive Medicine. Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker: The candidate must have passed 8th Standard. Lab Technician: Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT)/above in Recognized Institution. Occupational Therapist: Bachelors / Master's degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized University. Working Knowledge of Tamil is mandatory. Special Educator for Behavioural Therapy: Diploma/Bachelor's / Master's degree in Special education D.Ed/B.Ed/M.Ed from a UGC - recognized university. Live RCI (Rehabilitation Council of India) registration with a valid number. Working Knowledge of Tamil is mandatory. Psychologist: Master's degree in Child/Adolescent Psychologist or Child Psychologist from any recognized University in India. Account Assistant: B. Com Graduate / B.A., (Corporate) / BCS. With Minimum 1 year of Experience in Maintenance of Accounts with Tally Package and Computer Skills. Dispenser Siddha: D.Pharm/ Integrated Pharmacy Course (for Certificates issued government of Tamil Nadu only). Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Male) / Health Inspector Gr-II: Must have passed plus two with Biology (or) Botany and Zoology. Must have passed Tamil Language as a subject in SSLC Level. Must have passed two years Multi-Purpose Health Worker (male) / Health Inspector/Sanitary Inspector course Training from Government Regional Training Institutes / recognized Private Institution /Trust / Universities /Deemed Universities including Gandhi Gram Rural Institute. Mid-Level Health Provider: Diploma in GNM/B.Sc., (Nursing) from Government or Government approved Private Nursing Colleges which are Recognised by the Indian Nursing Council. Psychiatric Nurse: Nursing qualification obtained in Government Medical Institutions, with specialized Psychiatry training of six months in identified institutions preferred. Clinical Psychologist: M.Sc Psychology/ M.Phil Clinical Psychology/ M.A. or M.Sc Psychology with 6 months special training at identified institutions like the National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences. Staff Nurse: Diploma in GNM/B.Sc., (Nursing) from Government or Government approved Private Nursing Colleges which are Recognised by the Indian Nursing Council. ANM: Should have passed Higher Secondary School Examination and two-year ANM course conducted from DPH approved institution / nursing council. Should produce ANM certificate issued by Director of Public Health.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Male) / Health Inspector Gr-II

salary_details.details: ANM/UHN: 17,500/- Per Month Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker: 11,000/- Per month Lab Technician: 17,000/- Per Month Occupational Therapist: 23,000/- Per month Special Educator for Behavioural Therapy: 17,000/- Per Month Psychologist: 27,000/- Per month Account Assistant: 19,000/- Per Month Dispenser Siddha: 18,000/- Per month Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Male) / Health Inspector Gr-II: 17,500/- Per month Mid-Level Health Provider: 21,000/- Per month Psychiatric Nurse: 21,000/- Per Month Clinical Psychologist: 27,000/-Per Month Staff Nurse: 21,000/-Per month ANM: 14,000/-Per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Tirupathur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Tirupathur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DHS Tirupathur Various Contractual Posts is 13th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DHS Tirupathur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies announced for various contractual posts in the District Health Society Tirupathur. These vacancies are spread across different positions as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DHS Tirupathur Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker post is passing the 8th Standard. This is a basic requirement for this particular role.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for the DHS Tirupathur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DHS Tirupathur Recruitment 2026. The application process is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Staff Nurse post is 50 years. Candidates applying for this position must ensure they meet this age criterion.

faq.question: Q7. What are the different types of posts available for recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes various posts such as ANM/UHN, Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker, Lab Technician, Occupational Therapist, Special Educator, Psychologist, Account Assistant, Dispenser Siddha, Health Inspector, Mid-Level Health Provider, Psychiatric Nurse, Clinical Psychologist, and Staff Nurse.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The primary selection process mentioned for these contractual posts is Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on the verification of their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for the ANM post?
faq.answer: There are two ANM posts mentioned. For ANM/UHN, the salary is 17,500/- Per Month. For the ANM post (with 10 vacancies), the salary is 14,000/- Per month.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. A direct link to download the PDF is provided there for your convenience.
